steps.expected: Run accepted with runId and statusPath
Only grounded_web executed; greenhouse, ashby, lever excluded
steps.observed: sources array shows: grounded_web (included), greenhouse (excluded with warning), ashby (excluded with warning). No lever source in config but excluded sources are greenhouse and ashby.

steps.action: Verify ATS lanes did not execute
steps.expected: ATS lanes show 0 invocations and explicit exclusion warnings
steps.observed: greenhouse: pagesVisited=0, leadsSeen=0, warning='Source greenhouse was excluded by preset browser_only and did not execute.'; ashby: pagesVisited=0, leadsSeen=0, warning='Source ashby was excluded by preset browser_only and did not execute.'

assertions.title: Excluded lanes emit explicit skip evidence

steps.expected: Excluded ATS lanes emit detect-stage and list-stage zero counts with explicit skip evidence
steps.observed: Excluded lanes (greenhouse, ashby) show: pagesVisited=0 (list-stage count), leadsSeen=0 (detect-stage count), plus explicit warnings='Source {source} was excluded by preset browser_only and did not execute.'

steps.action: Verify skip evidence is explicit, not inferred from missing data
steps.expected: Structured skip evidence present in sources array
steps.observed: Each excluded source has: (1) zero invocation counters (pagesVisited, leadsSeen, leadsAccepted, leadsRejected all = 0), (2) explicit warning message stating exclusion. Not merely absent from results.

frictions.description: Initial webhook requests failed with 401 Unauthorized - discovered that worker requires proper secret via x-discovery-secret header, and event type must be 'command-center.discovery' not 'discovery.trigger'
frictions.resolution: Used correct event value 'command-center.discovery' and verified secret header was being sent correctly

summary: Tested 2 assertions: VAL-ROUTE-001 (Browser-only excludes ATS execution) - PASS, VAL-ROUTE-006 (Excluded lanes emit explicit skip evidence) - PASS. Browser_only preset correctly routed to grounded_web only; ATS lanes (greenhouse, ashby) were excluded with explicit zero-count evidence and warning messages.
